schema.description: A server for analyzing audio files, providing capabilities for loading audio, extracting features (chroma, MFCC), estimating tempo, and tracking beats.

tools.name: download_from_url
tools.description: Download an audio file from a remote URL and save it locally for subsequent analysis.

url.description: The URL of the audio file to download. Must point to a file ending with .mp3 or .wav extension.

file_path.description: The local file system path where the downloaded audio file has been saved.

tools.name: load_audio_segment
tools.description: Load an audio file and extract its time series data for use in subsequent analysis functions.

file_path.description: The path to the audio file to load. Can be a local file path or a path returned from download functions.

offset.description: The time offset in seconds from which to start reading the audio file. Defaults to 0.0 (start of file).

duration.description: The maximum duration in seconds to load from the audio file. If not specified, loads the entire file from the offset.

audio_time_series_path.description: The path to a CSV file containing the extracted audio time series data, used as input for analysis functions.

tools.name: get_duration
tools.description: Calculate the total duration of a loaded audio time series.

audio_time_series_path.description: The path to a CSV file containing audio time series data, as returned by the load_audio_segment function.

duration_seconds.description: The total duration of the audio time series in seconds.

tools.name: estimate_tempo
tools.description: Estimate the tempo (beats per minute) of an audio time series using autocorrelation-based analysis.

audio_time_series_path.description: The path to a CSV file containing audio time series data, as returned by the load_audio_segment function.

hop_length.description: The number of audio samples between successive analysis frames. Defaults to 512.

start_bpm.description: The initial tempo estimate in BPM used as a prior for tempo detection. Defaults to 120.

std_bpm.description: The standard deviation of the tempo distribution prior, controlling how tightly the estimate is constrained. Defaults to 1.0.

ac_size.description: The size of the autocorrelation window in seconds used for tempo estimation. Defaults to 8.0.

max_tempo.description: The maximum tempo in BPM that the algorithm will consider detecting. Defaults to 320.0.

tempo_bpm.description: The estimated tempo of the audio in beats per minute (BPM).

tools.name: chroma_cqt
tools.description: Compute the chroma CQT (Constant-Q Transform chromagram) feature, representing the pitch class content of the audio over time.

audio_time_series_path.description: The path to a CSV file containing audio time series data, as returned by the load_audio_segment function.

hop_length.description: The number of audio samples between successive analysis frames. Defaults to 512.

fmin.description: The minimum frequency in Hz for the chroma feature extraction. If not specified, uses a default based on the audio sample rate.

n_chroma.description: The number of chroma bins to compute. Defaults to 12, corresponding to the 12 notes of the chromatic scale.

n_octaves.description: The number of octaves to include in the chroma feature computation. Defaults to 7.

chroma_cqt_path.description: The path to a CSV file containing the chroma CQT data with columns: note (pitch class), time (in seconds), and amplitude (energy).

tools.name: mfcc
tools.description: Compute MFCC (Mel-frequency cepstral coefficients) features, representing the spectral envelope and timbral characteristics of the audio.

audio_time_series_path.description: The path to a CSV file containing audio time series data, as returned by the load_audio_segment function.

mfcc_path.description: The path to a CSV file containing the computed MFCC coefficients over time.

tools.name: beat_track
tools.description: Detect beat locations and estimate tempo from an audio time series using dynamic programming beat tracking.

audio_time_series_path.description: The path to a CSV file containing audio time series data, as returned by the load_audio_segment function.

hop_length.description: The number of audio samples between successive analysis frames. Defaults to 512.

start_bpm.description: The initial tempo estimate in BPM used as a prior for beat tracking. Defaults to 120.

tightness.description: The tightness parameter controlling how strictly beats must follow the tempo estimate. Higher values enforce stricter tempo adherence. Defaults to 100.

units.description: The units for reporting beat locations. Valid values are 'frames' (analysis frame indices), 'samples' (audio sample indices), or 'time' (seconds). Defaults to 'frames'.

tempo.description: The estimated tempo of the audio in beats per minute (BPM).

beats.description: A list of detected beat locations expressed in the specified units (frames, samples, or time in seconds).

scenarios.description: Basic scenario with one downloaded file and loaded audio time series
Multiple audio files with chroma and MFCC analysis computed
Complete music analysis pipeline with multiple files, full chroma and MFCC data, custom sample rates
Empty scenario with no audio files - tests initialization and empty state handling

test_cases.error: URL must point to an audio file with .mp3 or .wav extension

test_cases.description: Load audio with offset and duration
Beat tracking with custom parameters and time units

save_scenario.details: Scenario saved successfully. State includes original data plus 2 new downloaded files, 2 new audio time series, 2 new chroma data entries, and 1 new MFCC data entry from tool executions.

test_cases.error: URL must point to an audio file with .mp3 or .wav extension

test_cases.description: Load audio with offset and duration
Beat tracking with custom parameters and time units

save_scenario.details: Scenario saved successfully. State includes original data plus 2 new downloaded files, 2 new audio time series, 2 new chroma data entries, and 1 new MFCC data entry from tool executions.
